Tentative Ruling adopted: Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except for $50 per pay period. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment debtor. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
